ingredients: 1 kg medium squid, cleaned; ink sacs reserved (optional but traditional)
steps: Clean squid; reserve ink sacs and mix ink with a little water (optional).

In a pot, combine squid, soy sauce, vinegar, water, garlic, bay leaves, peppercorns and ink mixture. Bring just to a boil, then simmer briefly (about 1 to 2 minutes). Remove squid and reserve cooking liquid.
In a pan, heat oil and saute onion until soft. Add tomatoes and cook until they break down.
Pour in reserved adobo liquid and simmer 3 to 5 minutes to reduce slightly.
Return squid and cook only 2 to 3 minutes more, just until tender. Serve with rice.
tips: Do not overcook squid or it will turn tough; keep the simmer brief and finish cooking in the sauce.
